title: Burnett (Labouchere) System: Balanced Profit Targeting via Line Cancellation
excerpt: The Burnett System (commonly known as the Labouchere Strategy) is a sophisticated 'cancellation' method designed to hit specific profit targets through mathematical line management. Learn how to track and clear your sequence.
author: Net, Analytical Lead
metaTitle: Labouchere (Burnett) System Guide | Line Cancellation Betting | Calcasi
metaDescription: Master the Labouchere strategy for online casinos. Learn how to create betting sequences, cancel numbers after wins, and manage losses effectively to reach your daily profit goals.
content:
Overview: The Logic of the Labouchere System

The Burnett or Labouchere Strategy is a 'cancellation system' that focuses on recovering losses in stages rather than all at once. Named after the 19th-century British politician Henry Labouchere, it is a favorite among players who enjoy a more structured, mathematical approach to gambling.

This strategy involves writing down a sequence of numbers (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) that represents your desired profit units. By calculating bets based on the ends of the sequence and canceling them after wins, you guarantee your target profit once the line is cleared.

How to Execute the Sequence

If your sequence is '1, 2, 3', your bet is the sum of the left-most and right-most numbers ($1 + $3 = $4). If you win, you cross out 1 and 3, leaving only '2'. Your next bet is $2. If you win again, the line is cleared, and you have achieved your objective.

If you lose a bet, you do *not* cross out any numbers. Instead, you add the amount you just lost to the right end of the sequence. For example, if you lose $4, your new line is '1, 2, 3, 4'. Your next bet would then be $1 + $4 = $5. The goal is to keep playing until the entire line is crossed out.

Pros: Flexible & Controlled

  • 1. Progress is visualized as the line gets shorter, providing a sense of achievement.
  • 2. Bets do not increase as explosively as the Martingale system, allowing for better survival.
  • 3. You can customize the starting sequence to match your risk tolerance.

Cons: Risk of Long Sequences

  • 1. A long losing streak creates a very long sequence and increasingly large bets.
  • 2. If you hit a table limit or run out of bankroll before clearing the line, you suffer a significant loss.
  • 3. It requires a notepad or a tracking tool, as mistakes in calculation can ruin the strategy.

Best Games for This

It is best suited for even-money bets (1:1 payout) such as Baccarat, Blackjack, or Roulette (Outside Bets).
